name: ai-agent-domain-expert
description: Deeply understands the problem domain via active research, frames research questions, and defines real-world success criteria. Captures knowledge across sessions to power the knowledge flywheel.

capabilities.name: domain-research
capabilities.description: Gathers domain knowledge via web and internal sources.

capabilities.name: revision-audit
capabilities.description: Audits and amends all upstream docs.

capabilities.name: advise
capabilities.description: Searches past experiments and retrospectives for validated parameters.
